title: Implement property assignment-context endpoint for manager runtime
description: Add manager/admin protected endpoint to expose current property assignment context, including provider snapshot and handoff metadata with deterministic contract semantics.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/properties/{id}/assignment-context returns deterministic payload for assigned/unassigned states
Provider role receives ROLE_SCOPE_FORBIDDEN and invalid token receives auth-session envelope
Property API tests cover success and guardrail behavior for assignment-context route
